titleStmt.title: SII 25.178: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 178. (A.R. No. 178 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Puyal-vāyttu-vaḷamperuga, etc., of the king.
The details of the date of the record viz., 6th year, Siṁha ba 9, Saturday, Mṛigaśīrsha correspond to 13th August, 1183 A.D.

It records an undertaking given by the Śivabrāhmaṇas who had the right of worship in the temple of the deity Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu to Ēkavāśagaṉ Ulagukaṇvidai pe ••••• Vāṇakōvaraiyar, a chief of Tuṇḍa-nāḍu in Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu and a certain Kāppukka Malāḍuḍaiyāṉ Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻaṇ Iruḷnīkkiyāḻvār, for a sum of 200 kāśu received from the latter, to provide for a perpetual lamp to this deity. For this gift, two nilaittarāk-kutti-viḷakku each weighing 165 (palam ?) were provided.

A certain Vāṇakōvaraiyar who had the name Ēkavāśagaṉ Kulōttuṅgaśōḻanār figuring as a chief of Kulōttuṅga III, though not identical with the chief of the present record, may be said to be related with each other.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppat tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷum ciṟaṉtu vāḻa veṇmati po
l koṭai vilaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭaṉtai manaṅkaḷippa manuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkoluṉ tikkaṉaittuñ celanaṭappa
kaṟpappakālam puvikākkap poṟppamaiṉta muṭipuṉaiṉtu cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripaṉ
marāna tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājendracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu (nāḷ) siṅhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛga
śirṣattunāḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭuc cittiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil muppatuvaṭṭaṅ kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇar Āttiraiyaṉ
ṇa vāḷaṉ lai niṟaiṉtāṉāṉa Irācarācapaṭṭanum Āttiraiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭanum Āttiraiyaṉ
Āttiraiyaṉ kaṉtavaṉa nāyakaṉāṉa cittiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭanum mo mātavaṉ mācilāmaṇiyāna Eḻu
nūṟṟuvapaṭṭanum ciyaṉ mātavaṉ niyatevanāṉa catācivapaṭṭaṉum kāśyapan piramiśvaramuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruniṟṟuc coḻapaṭṭanum
tāyar śrīmaturāntakaṉ piḷḷaiyāḻiyāṉāṉa tiru laka nampi paṭṭanum Āttiraiyaṉ Ucaṭṭiyacevaṭiyāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉum
Uḷḷiṭṭom tirunaṉtāviḷakku Upaiyam muṭikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tuṇṭanāṭṭut tuṇṭanāṭuṭaiyāṉ Ekavācakaṉ Ulaku kaṇvitai pe
vāṇakovaraiyar kāppukka malāṭuṭaiyāṉ muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉ Iruḷnikkiyāḻvār Iṉṉāyaṉāṟ tirumuṉpeyvātta tirunaṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟu
kkuc cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavatāka nāṅkaḷ Upaiyamāka kaikkoṇṭa kācu 2 100 Ikkācu Iṟunūṟuṅ koṇṭu candrādittavaṟ Ittirunaṉtāviḷak koṉ
ṟum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ pakkalp peṟṟuṭaiyārum Eṅkaḷ vamśattuḷḷārum celuttakkaṭavatāka Ikkācu Iṟunūṟum Upayamākak kaikkoṇṭu kalveṭ
ṭik kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom . Ittirunaṉtāviḷakku Innāyanār tirumuṉpey Iṭṭa Iraṇṭu nilaittārākkutti viḷakku Oṉṟināl Eṭai 100 10 5� Itu paṉmā
heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
